tags.description: A large sandstone rock formation. Sacred to the Pitjantjatjara and Yankunytjatjara, the Aboriginal people of the area. It has many springs, waterholes, rock caves and ancient paintings. Uluru is listed as a World Heritage Site.
tags.name: Uluṟu
tags.note:name: Naming was discussed in talk-au on October 2019
tags.source:note:name: https://lists.openstreetmap.org/pipermail/talk-au/2019-October/013151.html
